results.title: Start an Internet Radio Station | Citrus3 - The Internet Radio Company
results.content:
Canvas Logo Canvas Logo

## Everything you need to create your own online radio station.

# Launch your station with ease. anywhere, anytime.

Stream worldwide—anytime, anywhere. Reach thousands with just a computer and an internet connection.

Citrus3 Dashboard Screenshot

#### Free mobile apps

Showcase your station’s unique branding with a beautifully crafted app, featuring station info, album artwork, and now-playing details. Developed specifically for your station, it lets listeners tune in from anywhere on iPhone and Android.

#### Software included [...] #### Software included

Start broadcasting live from your computer whenever you choose, without the need for expensive studio software. Citrus3 is specifically designed to provide everything you need to go live in just 5 minutes, empowering you to create professional-quality broadcasts instantly.

#### Powerful autoDJ

Designed for modern broadcasters who value simplicity. Upload your MP3s to our AutoDJ service, create and schedule your playlist, and let us handle the broadcasting while you relax. It’s broadcasting made easy.

## Loved by radio stations worldwide

Tools made just for you to let you broadcast exactly how you want.

### Album (cover) art

With automated technology display what's playing on your radio with cover artwork.

### Free Radio Page [...] ### Free Radio Page

No website? No problem! Listeners can tune in instantly from your free radio page.

### Listener Reporting

View live listener trends, track performances and popularity, user agents, and much more.

iphone 2

### Mobile apps

Provide your listeners with iOS & Android apps of your station. Free with select plans.

### Website Integration

Copy and paste 'tune in' links, album art and on demand widgets directly on your website.

### HTML5 Website Player

Add a radio player to your website so listeners can tune in the moment they visit.

Copyrights © All Rights Reserved by citrus3.com

results.title: KRTU FM 91.7 | Trinity University
results.content:
San Antonio Parks Foundation Logo

Image of Tobin Center Logo

Image of Carver Community Center Logo

Submit a PSA

EEO Public File

FCC Public File

##### Title [...] Community Hosts
 Daily Shows
 Weekly Shows

 On-Air Announcements
 Public Service Announcements

## A leader in commercial-free, listener supported radio.

KRTU specializes in diverse, locally-curated music programming that showcases regional musicians, with a focus on community outreach and education.

On-air Schedule  Indie Overnight

##### Connect With KRTU

## Celebrating 50 Years of BroadcastingExcellence on the Airwaves [...] A HISTORY OF EXCEPTIONAL PROGRAMMING

## On-Air Since 1976

What began as a strictly volunteer, primarily student-run college radio station is now a professional nonprofit, widely respected media outlet, and exemplary student laboratory. In 2016, the station celebrated its 40th anniversary.

Read through KRTU’s History

## Your Passport to Jazz

Jazz is so much more than music, and KRTU is so much more than a radio station. KRTU Members make San Antonio special and unique through their financial support of KRTU.

Join our vibrant community as a member today!

Learn about Membership Benefits

## Featured Sponsors

KRTU would like to thank our featured sponsors for their support and dedication to supporting local music, education, and independent listening.
